auth_subtitle: Vote on trending polls and share your opinion
google_auth_hint: A new account is created automatically if needed
google_emulator_hint: Development mode — enter your Gmail address
google_auth_error: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
google_auth_not_enabled: Google sign-in is not enabled in Firebase yet. Follow the steps below.
google_auth_requires_firebase: Firebase setup is required for Google sign-in
firebase_setup_hint: Connect Firebase first for Google sign-in. Tap the button for steps.
firebase_setup_steps:
1) Open:
https://console.firebase.google.com/project/soz-sende-app/authentication/providers

2) If shown, tap Get started

3) Google → Enable → Save

4) Terminal:
cd ~/Projects/YouHaveToSay
./scripts/refresh-google-config.sh

5) flutter run (restart)
password_min_length: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth_error: Sign in failed. Please check your credentials.
poll_load_error: Could not load poll. Please try again.
vote_error: Could not submit vote. Please try again.
feed_load_error: Could not load feed. Please try again.
no_more_comparisons_title: You've voted on everything for now!
no_more_comparisons_body: Come back later for new comparisons.
already_voted: You already voted on this comparison.
voted_history_empty: You haven't voted on any comparisons yet.
